# Joe Bryant — Architectural Photographer

> Los Angeles-based architectural and commercial photographer with 21 years
> of experience. Cinematic photography of luxury residences, interiors,
> estates, hospitality spaces, campaigns and portraits of the people who
> shape them. Available in Los Angeles and worldwide.

## Who

- Name: Joe Bryant
- Profession: Architectural, luxury real estate and commercial photographer
- Location: Los Angeles, California (works worldwide)
- Experience: 21 years (shooting since age 18)
- Contact: joe@joebryant.co · +1 310-890-3687
- Website: https://joebryant.co
- Instagram/X: @joebryantco

## Services

- Architectural photography (exteriors, twilight, aerial/drone)
- Luxury real estate photography (estates, celebrity homes, listings)
- Interior design photography
- Hospitality photography (hotels, restaurants, commercial spaces)
- Commercial and product campaigns
- Editorial and portrait photography (architects, designers, executives, talent)

## Notable work and subjects

- Credited photographer for "The One" mega-estate, Bel Air (architect Paul McClean)
- McClean Design residences, Beverly Hills and Los Angeles
- Portrait of John Legend (studio session at the piano)
- Portrait of Brian Ludlow, CEO of Creative Art Partners
- Portrait of Michael Mortenson and Craig Taggart, founders and lead trial
  lawyers of Mortenson Taggart
- Bentley Mills product campaigns

## Press

Work featured in Architectural Digest, Wall Street Journal, Dwell, LA Times,
InStyle, People, Daily Mail, Paper City, and on NBC.

## Clients

Disney, Sotheby's International, Dolce & Gabbana, Amangiri, Booking.com,
Aaron Kirman Group, Bentley Mills, Panda Express, Atom Factory, Tart Optical.

## Booking

Commissions and licensing: joe@joebryant.co. Based in Los Angeles; travels
worldwide for architecture, hospitality and campaign work.
